name: Built Rite Marine
tagline: Boat, dock & trailer repair across Sonoma County.
seoDescription: Built Rite Marine — mobile boat, dock, and trailer repair in Sonoma County, CA. Outboard & sterndrive service, fiberglass & gelcoat, dock and lift work, trailer repair, winterizing and storage.

hero.heading: Built right. Runs right.
hero.subheading: Mobile boat, dock, and trailer repair across Sonoma County — engines, fiberglass, lifts, and trailers, fixed right the first time so you get back on the water.

about.heading: Sonoma County's marine fix-it shop
body: Built Rite Marine keeps Sonoma County out on the water. From Lake Sonoma and the Russian River to the Petaluma River and the Bodega coast, we handle the work most shops are backed up on — outboard and sterndrive service, fiberglass and gelcoat, dock and lift repair, and the trailer that has to make it to the ramp and back.

It's straightforward: diagnose it honestly, fix it right the first time, and tell you what it'll cost before we start. Most jobs we'll come to your slip, dock, or driveway — so your boat barely has to move.

services.title: Outboard & sterndrive service
services.description: Tune-ups, diagnostics, water pumps, lower units, and repower for outboards and sterndrives — keep your rig starting on the first turn.

services.title: Hull, fiberglass & gelcoat
services.description: Fiberglass and gelcoat repair, blister work, and clean bottom paint that holds up to a Sonoma County season.

services.title: Docks, lifts & pilings
services.description: Build, re-deck, and repair docks and gangways, and install or service boat lifts so loading is easy and safe.

services.title: Trailers, bearings & brakes
services.description: Bearings, lights, brakes, and frame work so the trip to the launch is the easy part of your day.

services.title: Winterizing & storage prep
services.description: Winterize, fog the engine, and shrink-wrap so spring launch is painless — and your boat sits right all winter.

services.title: Mobile dockside service
services.description: Most jobs we handle on-site at your slip, dock, or driveway anywhere in Sonoma County — less hauling for you.

hoursNote: Call or text to book a repair — most quotes within 24 hours.

sections.heading: Engines, hulls, docks & trailers
sections.intro: One call for the work that usually takes three. Honest diagnosis, an up-front price, and it's fixed right the first time.

sections.heading: On the water across Sonoma County
sections.note: Mobile service across Sonoma County — call to confirm we cover your launch or slip.

items.q: Do you come to the boat?
items.a: Most jobs, yes — we handle outboard service, trailer work, and a lot of dock and lift repair on-site at your slip, dock, or driveway. Bigger fiberglass and repower jobs may come to the shop.

items.q: What kind of boats do you work on?
items.a: Outboards, sterndrives, fishing boats, ski and pontoon boats, and aluminum hulls — the rigs people actually run on Sonoma County water.

items.q: How fast can I get a quote?
items.a: Call or text with what's going on and we'll usually get you a quote within 24 hours, with the price agreed before any work starts.

items.q: Do you do dock and lift work too?
items.a: Yes — building, re-decking, and repairing docks and gangways, plus installing and servicing boat lifts.
